# Lattice Boltzmann

**Summary**: A computational fluid dynamics method that simulates fluid flow by modeling the motion of particles on a lattice.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-g201703430kfupmedusa|g201703430@kfupm.edu.sa, 2019]] applied Lattice-Boltzmann Method to simulate fluid flow and estimate permeability in 3D segmented models.

## Key Results and Findings

- LBM was used to calculate absolute permeability from the Darcy equation using 3D images. ([[2019-g201703430kfupmedusa|g201703430@kfupm.edu.sa, 2019, p. 102]])
